title: 2nd That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Film Reveals English Dub Trailer, Cast
content: Crunchyroll revealed on Tuesday the English dub trailer and cast for That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea ( Gekijō-ban Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken: Sōkai no Namida-hen ), the second anime film in the That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken )…
author: ANN

title: One Piece Releases First Look Trailer for New Netflix Anime Remake
content: A brand new One Piece remake anime is now in the works, and Netflix has given fans the first look at what to expect from The One Piece with its first teaser trailer. One Piece has made a huge comeback this Spring as following a few months of being inactive, the franchise has returned for a new season of the TV anime…
author: ComicBook

title: Dandadan Reveals Live-Action Adaptation, Junji Ito Crossover to Celebrate Major Anniversary
content: Momo and Okarun are one of the most popular dynamic duos in the history of anime, with the stars of Dandadan making a big splash thanks to not only their original manga but the first two seasons of their anime adaptation.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action One Piece Season 3 Premieres in 2027
content: Netflix announced on Tuesday that the third live-action season based on Eiichiro Oda 's One Piece manga will premiere in 2027 under the name One Piece : The Battle of Alabasta . The third season has previously cast Cole Escola as Bon Clay, Xolo Maridueña as Portgas D. Ace, Awdo Awdo as Mr.
author: ANN

title: One Piece Remake by WIT Studio Shares New Teaser Featuring Character Designs & Image Boards
content: THE ONE PIECE remake by WIT Studio has a new teaser featuring character designs and image boards from the creation process. The anime is a collaboration with Netflix, and the new anime was announced in 2023 with a teaser of ‘Romance Dawn’ starting in East Blue.
author: Anime Corner

title: GlobalComix Adds 1,500 Kodansha Manga Titles to Gold Members Library
content: Notable titles include: • Tokyo Revengers • The Drops of God • Shugo Chara! • FAIRY TAIL • The Seven Deadly Sins • BLAME! • Parasyte • Your Lie in April The company added more than 500 volumes of manga from Kodansha 's library in English on August 21, available worldwide via à la carte purchase.
author: ANN

title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream Game's New Trailer Introduces Part-Time Jobs, New Characters
content: Nintendo streamed a new trailer for Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream , the latest game in the Tomodachi Life series, to introduce part-time jobs and new characters on Monday. A demo launched on March 25. The demo allows players to create up to three Mii characters, and progress can transfer to the full game at launch.
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s One Piece Shares Major Season 3 Update
content: One Piece’s second live-action season witnessed the Straw Hats bouncing around the Grand Line to face their biggest live-action challenges to date. Following the release of season two earlier this year, Netflix has gone all-in when it comes to Monkey D. Luffy and his crew.
author: ComicBook

title: LEGO ONE PIECE Two-Part Animated Special Announced for September 29 Netflix Streaming
content: LEGO ONE PIECE 2-part animation special project has been announced, set to begin streaming on September 29 on Neflix. The project will highlight Usopp narrating the crew’s tales, and it’s described: “Witness the legendary tales of the East Blue and Grand Line like never before!
author: Anime Corner

title: MiSK Foundation's Investment Company EGDC Increases Stake in CAPCOM to 6%
content: Electronic Gaming Development Company (EGDC), an investment company wholly owned by Saudi Arabian organization MiSK Foundation (Mohammed bin Salman Foundation), submitted another Large Shareholding Report to the Kanto Local Finance Bureau on April 6.
author: ANN
